name: Proline Puppy Food - Chicken 15kg
shortDescription: Fully balanced all-natural puppy food with chicken protein plus brewer's yeast and whey protein for immune support and omega -3 and -6 from flaxseed. Carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of growing puppies.
description: Help your puppy grow into a strong, healthy, and happy dog with Proline Puppy Food – Chicken . This fully balanced, all-natural dry food is carefully crafted by expert canine nutritionists to meet the unique nutritional demands of puppies during their rapid growth phase. With high-quality chicken protein, omega fatty acids, and immune-boosting ingredients, it’s the perfect foundation for lifelong wellness. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ............................................... 28% Fat ..................................................... 16% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ........................4% INGREDIENTS: Processed Animal Protein, Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Wheat Middlings, Corn Gluten, Dried Sugar Beet, Chicken Liver Aroma, Rice, Salt, Whey Powder, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer's Yeast. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (biotin) - B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan. Key Benefits 28% Protein from Chicken – for healthy muscle growth and strong development. 16% Fat Content – provides the high energy puppies need for play and learning. DHA & Taurine Enriched – supports brain development and sharp vision. Brewer’s Yeast & Whey Protein – to strengthen immunity and aid digestion. Omega-3 & Omega-6 (from flaxseed) – promotes a shiny coat and healthy skin. Rich in Calcium & Phosphorus – for strong bones and teeth.
